validate.notes: Fixed test_condition_is_not_narrowed in tests/test_outputs.py. The test was matching a comment earlier in the file (line 1282) instead of the actual test function (line 1326) because it searched for 'SameSite' and 'Secure attribute' which appeared in a comment. Changed to match the specific test function signature starting with 'it(' and containing 'should support set-cookie with SameSite' and 'without Secure attribute'.

ci_commands_discovered: npm run build - Builds the project (required before check-deps)
npm run check-deps - Dependency check (requires build first)
p2p_tests_added: test_repo_build - Repo build step completes successfully
commands_skipped: npm run lint-tests - Requires built packages (covered by build + check-deps)
npm test / ctest / ftest - Requires browser binaries and takes too long (>120s)
p2p_enrichment.notes: All 4 p2p tests pass on both base commit and after gold fix. Tests run npm install first to ensure dependencies are available.
